topic: Ship It: A 5-minute lightning talk manifesto on why waiting for perfection kills projects, urging the DevCon 2024 audience to release their MVPs immediately.
Stop Managing Your Time: A bold-opinion essay arguing that energy management, not time management, is the sole key to unlocking creative output for independent workers.
Water Changes Everything: A rapid-fire ignition talk for the PureWater Initiative, demonstrating the domino effect of clean water access in rural Malawi.
The Relentless Year: A single-idea closing manifesto for the Apex Systems 2024 kickoff, rallying the entire company around the concept of moving fast and breaking barriers.
